# Governance Directives

Follow these directives in every file you write or edit.

## Non-Negotiable Constraints

These are invariants. Violation is never acceptable.

- Every command and template must be a `.md` or `.yaml` file. No TypeScript, no compiled binaries, no build step. Installation is copy files only — no npm, no package managers. (ref: INV-001)
- ADRs in `draft` may be freely edited. Once `accepted`, content is immutable — never edit it. When a decision changes, create a new ADR that supersedes the old one and update the old ADR's `Status:` to `Superseded by ADR-NNN`. No other changes permitted after acceptance. (ref: INV-002)

## Routing Table

Before starting a task, scan this table. If your task matches any signals or scopes, read the referenced file.

| Signals | Scope | File |
|---|---|---|
| platform, rules, plan, architecture, structure | planning, design, review, implementation | `governance/architecture.md` |
| agent, specialist, advisor, subagent, evaluator, domain signal, BLOCKED | planning, design, review, implementation | `governance/agent-rules.md` |
| hook, PostToolUse, format, preprocessing, CLAUDE.md, sentinel, fixture, characterization, JSON protocol, systemMessage | implementation | `governance/hooks.md` |
| template, override, custom, rule pack, upgrade | implementation | `governance/extensibility.md` |
| compile, governance, schema, directive, sentinel block, invariant record, INV, artifact | implementation, design | `governance/compile.md` |

## Reminders

Before acting, check the relevant constraint.

[edikt:reminders:start]: #
- "Before migrating a hook to JSON → verify the user-visible message is preserved byte-for-byte inside the wrapping (ref: ADR-014)"
- "Before re-adding a removed fixture pair → run the hook against the payload and capture actual output as the expected file (ref: ADR-014)"
[edikt:reminders:end]: #

## Verification Checklist

Before finishing, verify each item. If any fails, fix before submitting.

- [ ] No bare `echo '...'` (non-JSON) stdout emissions remain in templates/hooks/*.sh for migrated hooks (ref: ADR-014)
- [ ] The 3 previously-removed fixture pairs are present in docs/product/specs/SPEC-004-v050-stability/fixtures.yaml §9.1 with `verified_by` commands (ref: ADR-014)
- [ ] test/unit/hooks/test_*.sh all pass without EDIKT_SKIP_HOOK_TESTS=1 (ref: ADR-014)

## Reminder: Non-Negotiable Constraints

These constraints were listed above and are restated for emphasis.
Do not violate them under any circumstances.

- Every command and template must be a `.md` or `.yaml` file. No compiled code, no build step. (ref: INV-001)
- ADRs are immutable once accepted. Draft ADRs may be edited. To change an accepted decision, supersede — never edit. (ref: INV-002)
